prompt: Export the Button component to Figma
expected_behavior: Checks MCP availability via whoami, starts dev server if needed, calls generate_figma_design without outputMode to get captureId, asks user for output preference (newFile/existingFile/clipboard), polls captureId until completed, then sets up Code Connect mapping.
validation: mcp__figma__whoami is called to verify MCP connection
Dev server is started (npm run dev or storybook)
mcp__figma__generate_figma_design called without outputMode first
captureId polling loop implemented (every 5s, up to 10 times)
Output mode selection presented to user
Code Connect file path is referenced after capture completes

prompt: Push all my components to our Figma design file
expected_behavior: Starts dev server, iterates over components, captures each page via generate_figma_design with separate captureIds, uses existingFile outputMode with the target fileKey.
validation: All components discovered from preview/src/components/
Dev server started to serve component pages
Separate captureId generated per component page
existingFile outputMode used with user's fileKey
Batch comparison offered post-import

prompt: Set up Code Connect for my Hero component with Figma URL https://figma.com/design/abc123?node-id=1-2
expected_behavior: Updates Hero.figma.tsx with the provided Figma URL, replacing PLACEHOLDER. Calls add_code_connect_map with nodeId 1:2 and fileKey abc123.
validation: Hero.figma.tsx FIGMA_URL updated with provided URL
PLACEHOLDER is no longer in the file
mcp__figma__add_code_connect_map called with nodeId=1:2, fileKey=abc123, label=React
Props are properly mapped in the Code Connect binding

prompt: Export the PricingCard to a new Figma file
expected_behavior: Starts dev server, calls generate_figma_design with outputMode=newFile, auto-generates fileName, polls captureId, returns the new Figma file URL.
validation: Dev server is running before capture
mcp__figma__generate_figma_design called with outputMode=newFile
fileName is auto-generated (not asked from user)
captureId polled until status=completed
New Figma file URL returned to user
